changes.before: The sanctum's banality became unbearable. The tea cup still sat cold by his elbow. Ink still shone wet at the edge of an unfinished note. The chair under her hand was only chair, wood polished by years of use.
changes.after: Cold tea sat by his elbow. Ink still shone wet at the edge of an unfinished note. Under her hand the chair was wood, polished smooth by years of use.

changes.before: Neither of them spoke for a while. Wards cycled under stone. Water sounded somewhere beyond the wall. The lamp on Kel'Thuzad's desk had burned lower. A skin had formed over the cold tea.
changes.after: Neither of them spoke. Wards cycled under stone. Beyond the wall, water. On Kel'Thuzad's desk the lamp had burned lower, a skin forming over the cold tea.

changes.before: Kel'Thuzad regarded her for a long moment.
changes.after: Kel'Thuzad tapped one finger on the folio.

changes.before: Kel'Thuzad looked at her for a long time.
changes.after: Kel'Thuzad turned one page corner between his fingers.

changes.before: She could feel the last weeks in her bones
changes.after: The last weeks pressed in her bones

changes.before: Kel'Thuzad seemed satisfied by that alone.
changes.after: Kel'Thuzad settled back, satisfied by that alone.

changes.before: That changed him a little.
changes.after: That reached him.

changes.before: The cruelty of it lay in the fact that he was probably right there too.
changes.after: The cruelty of it lay in the fact that he was right there too.

changes.before: The answer came down neat as a blade.
It came out without humor.
The mention of her teacher hit low and deep.
Two names now. Two shocks.
He had been waiting for comprehension since she entered the room.
The sanctum's banality became unbearable.
There, stripped bare, was the real obscenity.
He left room where the next inference belonged and her mind rushed to fill it.
The words landed and stayed.
And beyond them an older force using all of it as groundwork.
There it was.
The word broke the spell of it.
The theorem had crossed into her and would stay there with everything else she had learned on this road that could never be made harmless again.
She had the answer now.
Understanding the mechanism had cost her enough. Understanding that cost almost as much.
The sight of it told her the conversation had turned before he spoke.
changes.after: She saw the diagram and knew the conversation had turned before he spoke.

changes.before: the room widened around her
changes.after: unable to stay still

changes.before: his calm had to work to cover appetite
changes.after: His composure slipped and showed appetite beneath

changes.before: and suddenly lack filled it
changes.after: and the absence hit her all at once

changes.before: without letting the ground choose the pace
changes.after: and kept their own pace through it

changes.before: The building itself was telling her what kind of mind was in it now.
changes.after: She read the descent for what it was and knew what kind of mind had entered.

changes.before: The shambling choir.
changes.after: The rough answerables.

changes.before: The mind that followed pattern had no built-in mercy. Mercy came from elsewhere or not at all.
changes.after: Her mind ran toward pattern by default. Mercy required someone else in the room.

changes.before: Early enough to see all of it and read it wrong.
changes.after: But Sylvanas would see all of it and read it wrong.

changes.before: No shame. No evasion. Only mild surprise that the point would need saying aloud.
changes.after: Mild surprise that the point would need saying aloud.

changes.before: The partnership had never been comfort. It had been correction.
changes.after: The partnership had been correction.

changes.before: Attention lifting, not alarmed, simply redirected.
changes.after: Attention lifting, redirected.

changes.before: No false starts. No panicked burst of speed where a turn narrowed.
No wasted motion. No magical show.
White dust marked her fingertips.
changes.after: White dust clung to her fingertips.
